title: Beta Ends Monday: Don't miss out on these results (Proof Inside!)
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hey Traders,

Talk is cheap, especially in trading. We prefer to let the data do the talking.

As we gear up to close our Beta phase this Monday, March 23rd, we wanted to share a snapshot of what our current users are experiencing. This is the kind of discipline and performance HerculMarket aims to bring to your routine.

Snapshot of our pre-launch performance:

Net PnL: +$1469.00

Win Rate: 62.5%

Profit Factor: 2.56

Total Trades: 8 (Quality over quantity!)

Look at that cumulative PnL curve. Consistency, minimal drawdown, and steady growth. That is the power of a disciplined routine.

We don't just give you "calls" at the US Open (9:30 AM EST / 15:30 CET). We give you a daily technical and fundamental roadmap for BTC, NVIDIA, and Gold so you can execute with this kind of clarity.

The clock is ticking. This Monday, we move to our subscription model:

Full Access: Daily US Open Briefings + This Performance Dashboard.

Price: Only €15 / month.

Don't start another trading week guessing the open. Join the ritual.

👉 Secure your spot before the Beta closes: https://herculmarket.com/

See you at the open on Monday. 🚀
